items.title: Normalcy bias and manipulation
items.subtitle: Short note on history
items.truncated_body_text: Normalcy bias is a cognitive bias which leads people to disbelieve or minimize threat warnings. Consequently, individuals underestimate the likelihood of a disaster, when it might affect them, and its potential adverse effects.
